name: Walnut Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, corn syrup, water, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Heat slowly until the sugar is dissolved. Then boil gently without stirring to 240°F (firm ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
3. While the syrup is boiling, beat the egg whites until stiff.
4. Gradually pour about one-third of the hot syrup over the egg whites.
5. Return the remaining syrup to cook to 265°F (hard ball stage).
6. Beat the remaining syrup into the egg whites continuously.
7. Add vanilla and continue beating until the mixture holds its shape.
8. If the candy is damp and refuses to hold its shape, beat in one teaspoon of powdered sugar at this stage.
9. Add the walnuts.
10. Drop spoonfuls onto wax paper or pour into a buttered 9-inch square pan and cut into squares when cool.
Makes about 1 1/2 pounds of candy.
